heroDescription: From commercial build-outs to residential renovations, GrayCo Construction Services delivers quality craftsmanship and reliable project management across the Mid-South.
aboutText1: GrayCo Construction Services is a full-service general contractor based in Bartlett, Tennessee. We bring deep technical knowledge across multiple construction trades to every project — from commercial tenant improvements to residential renovations, emergency water mitigation, and insurance restoration work.
aboutText2: Our hands-on approach means we don't just manage projects — we understand them inside and out. With precise estimating, meticulous material takeoffs, and a methodical eye for detail, we deliver results that exceed expectations while keeping costs under control.
ctaDescription: Get a free consultation and detailed estimate for your next build.
footerLicense: Licensed General Contractor — TN #85034 — 4007 Broadway Road, Bartlett, TN 38135
team: [{"photo":"","name":"Nick Thomas","role":"Owner","email":"nthomas@grayco-cs.com","phone":"(901) 634-4354","bio":"Nick is a co-founder of GrayCo Construction Services and brings 10 years of experience in commercial and residential construction management. His hands-on leadership style, deep industry knowledge, and excellence in sales ensure every project is executed with precision, efficiency, and quality results that speak for themselves. Nick holds a Bachelor’s degree in Business, combining sharp management skills with real-world construction experience that clients can always rely on."},{"photo":"","name":"Wesley Johnson","role":"Owner","email":"wjohnson@grayco-cs.com","phone":"(901) 692-7255","bio":"Wesley is a co-founder of GrayCo Construction Services and a Bartlett, TN native with 10 years of experience in insurance restoration with IICRC WRT certifications, commercial construction and tenant build outs, and project management. His detail-oriented approach to estimating, material takeoffs, and cost control keeps every project on budget while delivering quality results that speak for themselves. Wesley holds a Bachelor’s degree in Architectural Engineering, combining technical expertise with real-world experience to deliver at the highest level."},{"photo":"","name":"Glenn Miller","role":"Commercial Project Manager","email":"","phone":"","bio":"With 35 years in the industry, Glenn has done it all — from large-scale construction and insurance restoration to a drywall company an: everything in between. That depth of experience makes him an invaluable leader on every GrayCo project, where he estimates, coordinates trades, manages schedules, and holds each phase to the highest standards of quality and safety."}]
services: [{"title":"Commercial Construction","desc":"Tenant improvements, retail build-outs, restaurant construction, and office renovations delivered on time and on budget."},{"title":"Residential Construction","desc":"Custom homes, renovations, additions, and property restorations with meticulous attention to detail and quality craftsmanship."},{"title":"Emergency Water Mitigation","desc":"Rapid response water damage mitigation services to minimize loss and begin restoration immediately when disaster strikes."},{"title":"Insurance Restoration","desc":"Full-scope insurance restoration work from initial assessment through final completion, working directly with adjusters and carriers."},{"title":"Estimating & Takeoffs","desc":"Precise material takeoffs and cost estimating backed by deep trade knowledge across all construction disciplines."},{"title":"Project Management","desc":"End-to-end project oversight ensuring quality, safety, and schedule adherence from groundbreaking to final punch list."}]

The exterior received fresh paint and a brand-new roof, while the interior was rebuilt from the ground up — including two full bathroom remodels, custom site-built cabinetry and vanities topped with quartz, and walnut accents throughout. The kitchen centers on a striking walnut and tigerwood island with a built-in wine fridge, complemented by wood-look tile flooring. In the living room, a custom walnut slab countertop anchors the TV area, set against a bold navy accent wall. Going Upstairs with a custom cedar handrail to 2 bedroom and a navy-toned attic office build-out adds dedicated workspace, finished with new 25 lb. carpet, while luxury vinyl plank flows throughout the main level. Outside, a stone-covered back patio and grilling deck completes the transformation — blending craftsmanship and custom detail at every turn.","sqft":"2200","duration":"20","type":"Remodel Built from heavy-duty treated 8x8 posts and 2x6 framing, the structure spans the full length of the range to provide reliable overhead containment shot after shot. Every post was set and secured to withstand the demands of an active shooting environment, and the framing was carefully aligned across the entire 150-foot run to ensure consistent coverage and long-term structural integrity.
